html:
The Feather Pencil is a craftable Item located in the Tools Tab. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and 1 Twigs, 1 Charcoal and 1 Jet Feather to craft. The Feather Pencil can be used to draw an Item on a Mini Sign, which breaks the pencil. The closest Item placed on the ground is what will be drawn on the Mini Sign when using a Feather Pencil.

Trivia

  • The Feather Pencil was introduced to Don't Starve Together in A Little Fixer Upper update during A New Reign. It was later introduced to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.

Gallery

  • Feather Pencil as seen in the poster for the A Little Fixer Upper update.
  • Feather Pencil on the ground.
  • A Feather Pencil next to a Cartographer's Desk.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"featherpencil"
“The feather increases the scientific properties of the writing.”
–Wilson
“So what does the feather do again?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang must stick pinky out when holding it.”
–Wolfgang
“M...maybe I'll doodle something... When no one's looking.”
–Wendy
“WHY IS THE FEATHER SO APPEALING? EXPLAIN NOW, FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78
“Oh, how I missed proper writing implements!”
–Wickerbottom
“The bird murder wasn't even necessary. Heh.”
–Woodie
“Not as elegant as a quill and inkwell, but it'll do.”
–Maxwell
“A lightweight writing implement for use on signage.”
–Wagstaff
“Perhaps I'll pen a saga of my jöurneys!”
–Wigfrid
“Haha! It tickles!”
–Webber
“Lightweight. I like it.”
–Walani
“Lighter than my meringue.”
–Warly
“Fer makin' me mark.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA CANST DRAWETH WITH A BIRDY THING”
–Wilba
“Picture drawer”
–Wormwood
“So good it even makes my handwriting legible!”
–Wheeler
“I've got ugly handwriting.”
–Winona
“Use this quill, I will, I will.”
–Wortox
“For fancy writing, florp.”
–Wurt
“I feel like I should write something poetic with this...”
–Walter
“Good for jotting down notes in a hurry.”
–Wanda
The Feather Pencil is a craftable Item located in the Tools Tab. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and 1 Twigs, 1 Charcoal and 1 Jet Feather to craft. The Feather Pencil can be used to draw an Item on a Mini Sign, which breaks the pencil. The closest Item placed on the ground is what will be drawn on the Mini Sign when using a Feather Pencil.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Feather Pencil was introduced to Don't Starve Together in A Little Fixer Upper update during A New Reign. It was later introduced to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.

The '''Feather Pencil''' is a craftable [[Item]] located in the [[Tools Tab]]. It requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype and 1 [[Twigs]], 1 [[Charcoal]] and 1 [[Jet Feather]] to craft. The Feather Pencil can be used to draw an [[Item]] on a [[Mini Sign]], which breaks the pencil. The closest Item placed on the ground is what will be drawn on the Mini Sign when using a Feather Pencil.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Feather Pencil was introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in ''[[A New Reign#September 1st, 2016 - A Little Fixer Upper|A Little Fixer Upper]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. It was later introduced to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
